name: dj-music
description: DJ techno music library management — 13 generic MCP dispatchers (entity/provider/compute/sync/admin) + 20 resources + 6 prompts. FastMCP v3 bounded-contexts architecture.

args: cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" && set -a && source .env 2>/dev/null && set +a && SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN="${DJ_DB_ACCESS_TOKEN:?DJ_DB_ACCESS_TOKEN not set in .env}" exec npx -y @supabase/mcp-server-supabase@0.7.0 --read-only --project-ref=bowosphlnghhgaulcyfm --features=database,docs,debug
